versions.version_description: This is the first chord tab I've seen I believe

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
I play it like this: 

[tab]---------------------
------x-----------x--
------x-----------x--
---x-----------x-----
-x-------x--x--------
---------------------[/tab]

Hope you enjoy! 


[Chorus]

Because you know
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
I'm all about that bass -'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm all about that bass -'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
I'm all about that bass - 'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
I'm all about that bass - 'Bout that bass[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 Yeah, it's pretty clear, I ain't no size two[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 But I can shake it, shake it, Like I'm supposed to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
 'Cause I got that boom boom that all the boys chase[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And all the right junk in all the right places[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]A[/ch] 
I see the magazine workin' that Photoshop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  We know that shit ain't real, C'mon now, make it stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    
 If you got beauty, beauty, just raise 'em up[/tab]
              A   (hold)
'Cause every inch of you is perfect From the bottom to the top


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Yeah, my mama she told me don't worry about your size[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch]
She says, "Boys like a little more booty to hold at night."[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
You know I won't be no stick figure silicone Barbie doll[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]  -hold-
So if that's what you're into then go ahead and move along[/tab]


[Chorus]

Because you know
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
I'm all about that bass 'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm all about that bass 'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
I'm all about that bass 'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]

[Verse 2]
             A  -hold-
I'm bringing booty back

 Go ahead and tell them skinny bitches that[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                [ch]E[/ch]
 No I'm just playing. I know you think you're fat - But I'm here to tell ya[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
Every inch of you is perfect from the bottom to the top[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Yeah, my mama she told me don't worry about your size[/tab]

You know I won't be no stick figure silicone Barbie doll[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]  -hold-
